chain.thought: Explanation: CSKA Moscow appears twice (2004, 2005), Dnipro Dnipropetrovsk appears multiple times (2006/07 to 2012/13), Lokomotiv Moscow appears twice (2012/13, 2013/14), and Spartak Nizhny Novgorod appears only once (2006). Therefore, the team not listed more than once is Spartak Nizhny Novgorod.

judge_thought: Explanation: Interpreting the question in the context of top-flight (division 1) entries, every division 1 team appears more than once in the table. CSKA Moscow appears twice (2004, 2005), Dnipro Dnipropetrovsk appears across multiple seasons (2006/07 through 2012/13), and Lokomotiv Moscow appears twice (2012/13, 2013/14). Spartak Nizhny Novgorod’s single listing is in division 2, which is outside the implied scope. Thus, there is no division 1 team that is listed only once, making “null” (none) the correct response.
